doc_class_description: A Court of Appeal judgment is a higher court ruling that reviews decisions of lower courts, shaping legal precedent and protecting citizens’ rights.

latest_doc_d.description: Sumanalatha Kodikara Vs. Hon.Janaka Bandara Tennakoon, Minister of Lands and Land Development before Hon. Adithya Patabendige, J.
latest_doc_d.parties: Sumanalatha Kodikara Vs. Hon.Janaka Bandara Tennakoon, Minister of Lands and Land Development
latest_doc_d.keywords: Writ of Certiorari, Writ of Mandamus, Writ of Prohibition, Proviso (a) of Section 38, Section 2, and Section 4 of the Land Acquisition Act No.9 of 1950
latest_doc_d.legistation: Article 140 of the Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka, Proviso (a) of Section 38, Section 2, and Section 4 of the Land Acquisition Act No.9 of 1950
